task: Advanced high-economic-value task: SAML Replay Window Evidence Review. Produce a narrow, reproducible decision packet from the supplied embedded measurements only. Calculate margin = normalized_threshold_score - observed_risk_score and classify records: negative margin = FAIL, margin between 0 and 5% of the limit = WARN, margin >5% = PASS. Combine remediation options only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd. Mark expert-review required when any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift. Construct a reproducible workbook or script, document all assumptions, include intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and produce a concise expert memo for signoff. Deliverables: saml_replay_analysis.xlsx and idp_config_change.md. Do not invent inputs or use outside data; mark unresolved ambiguities as needs_review.
